title: Concept relation registry
description: Validates knowledge/concept-relations.yaml (or partitioned files). Only concept-to-concept semantic edges; note-to-concept and note-to-source links live on notes. There is deliberately no related-to type: use the narrowest applicable type, or keep the relationship in note prose. Duplicate edges and unresolvable endpoints are validator errors.

context.description: Optional condition under which the relation holds.
